bau_transition_checklist.action: Review this packet plus final validation, maintenance, stakeholder, celebration, cleanup, and documentation evidence.
Mark Task 80 and subtasks done only after verification evidence is captured.
Archive the Task 80 work-tracking folder only after the Task 80 PR merges.
Clear active session/plan pointers through the normal archive workflow after merge.

manual_actions: Review or refresh this source packet before treating Task 80 as release/BAU ready.

historical_requirement_map.current_boundary: Use the static deployment readiness checklist and final validation evidence.
historical_requirement_map.treatment: Compose and review evidence; do not deploy an application.

historical_requirement_map.current_boundary: Task 60 provides post-migration monitoring cadence evidence.
historical_requirement_map.treatment: Reference monitoring packet and refresh commands; do not enable monitoring services.

historical_requirement_map.current_boundary: Task 70 provides long-term maintenance planning evidence.
historical_requirement_map.treatment: Review maintenance cadence; do not install schedulers, daemons, alerts, or patch automation.

historical_requirement_map.current_boundary: No runtime migration flags exist in this portable foundation.
historical_requirement_map.treatment: Classify as not applicable unless a future task proves concrete flags to remove.

historical_requirement_map.current_boundary: Task 73 provides static stakeholder reporting and communication guidance.
historical_requirement_map.treatment: Prepare review material; do not send or publish communications.

historical_requirement_map.current_boundary: Task work-tracking archives happen after each PR merge.
historical_requirement_map.treatment: Archive Task 80 after merge; do not prematurely archive active work.

historical_requirement_map.current_boundary: Maintenance, operations, validation, and final docs provide BAU inputs.
historical_requirement_map.treatment: Use this packet as the BAU transition review surface.
Reference celebration material; do not schedule events or publish content.

label: task80-production-deployment

manual_next_steps.action: Review or refresh this source packet before treating Task 80 as release/BAU ready.
Resolve the source packet blocker before Task 80 sign-off.
Review or refresh this source packet before treating Task 80 as release/BAU ready.

non_goals: No production application deployment, release publication, package publish, or hosted service update is executed.
No traffic routing, feature flag rollout, automatic promotion, rollback execution, or service canary is performed.
No live monitoring service, dashboard, alert delivery, notification, scheduler, daemon, ticketing, or external observability integration is created or contacted.
No automatic guard auto-fix, cleanup mutation, maintenance automation activation, dependency update, or patch application is run.
No email, chat, publication, stakeholder notification, calendar event, celebration scheduling, or external communication is sent.
No Taskmaster, session, plan, work-tracking, Git, report source, template, or external state is mutated beyond requested production readiness packet artifacts.
